description: Data Center Supply Chain — AI Infrastructure Watch List (example)

portfolio_companies.name: Vertiv Holdings
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: Core AI data center infrastructure — UPS, cooling, power distribution. Co-developing solutions with NVIDIA. Most direct AI exposure in hardware supply chain.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: NVIDIA partnerships, hyperscaler contracts, M&A activity, BMarko integration

portfolio_companies.name: Equinix
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: 250+ data centers globally. AI workloads increasingly colocated due to power constraints. AI-native Fabric Intelligence platform deepens enterprise lock-in.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: xScale leasing announcements, AI connectivity product updates, capital raises

portfolio_companies.name: Eaton Corporation
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: Electrical infrastructure for data centers. Acquired Boyd Thermal ($9.5B) to enter liquid cooling. Grid-to-chip integrated offering targets hyperscalers.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: Boyd Thermal integration updates, new hyperscaler wins, guidance changes

portfolio_companies.name: nVent Electric
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: Thermal management enclosures and liquid cooling for AI racks. In NVIDIA partner network. Organic orders +65% YoY driven by hyperscale programs.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: Hyperscale program ramp, bolt-on M&A, NVIDIA partnership updates

portfolio_companies.name: Celestica
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: Rack-level AI server assembly. Primary partner for Google TPU board and rack integration. Liquid-cooled rack systems shifting economics to integrated rack-level delivery.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: Hyperscaler program announcements, earnings (Q1 due Apr 27), new customer wins

portfolio_companies.name: Arista Networks
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: Spine/leaf networking for hyperscale AI training clusters. Beneficiary of Ethernet-over-InfiniBand trend. Liquid-cooled optics for high-density AI racks.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: 800G/optical product wins, AI cluster fabric announcements, competitive vs. InfiniBand

portfolio_companies.name: Modine Manufacturing
portfolio_companies.ai_angle: Spinning off auto segment to become pure-play data center cooling. New Data Centers division + president. Order funnel 3x since Sep 2024. Small cap — potential acquisition target.
portfolio_companies.watch_for: Spin-off progress, acquisition interest signals, data center order wins

competitor_watchlist.name: Digital Realty
competitor_watchlist.ai_angle: Wholesale/hyperscale data center REIT. $3.25B hyperscale fund raised Apr 2026. Expanding to Italy, Singapore. Hyperscaler pre-leasing at record pace.
competitor_watchlist.watch_for: New fund activity, regional M&A, hyperscaler leasing announcements

competitor_watchlist.name: Accelsius
competitor_watchlist.status: Private — Series B ($65M, JCI + Legrand, early 2026)
competitor_watchlist.ai_angle: Two-phase direct-to-chip liquid cooling (NeuCool platform). Targets highest-density AI workloads. Founded 2022 (Innventure subsidiary). JCI strategic investment validates technology.
competitor_watchlist.watch_for: New customer wins, follow-on funding, strategic investor additions, acquisition signals

competitor_watchlist.name: Zayo Group
competitor_watchlist.ai_angle: Dense fiber network connecting data center campuses. Dark fiber and wavelength services are backbone for AI inference. PE hold approaching typical exit window.
competitor_watchlist.watch_for: Secondary sale, IPO signals, recapitalization, revenue run-rate leaks

key_people.name: Giordano Albertazzi
key_people.track: AI infrastructure strategy, hyperscaler partnerships, M&A commentary

key_people.name: Adaire Fox-Martin
key_people.track: AI colocation strategy, capital allocation, Fabric Intelligence rollout

key_people.name: Beth Wozniak
key_people.track: Liquid cooling strategy, NVIDIA partnership updates, M&A targets

key_people.name: Rob Mionis
key_people.track: AI server manufacturing pipeline, hyperscaler customer mix, margin guidance

m_and_a_context: Corp Dev / M&A focus on data center supply chain consolidation. Recent comps: CoolIT acquired by Ecolab ($4.75B, Mar 2026), Boyd Thermal by Eaton ($9.5B). AI power density increases make thermal management the binding constraint — cooling specialists command acquisition premiums. Key thesis: the supply chain is vertically integrating. Watch for: hyperscalers acquiring vendors for supply security, PE-backed assets approaching exit windows, compressed-multiple public cos becoming targets.
